Anatta Nergui
Home Browse Graph Lexicon Cloud Index Length About
← Collection

Daimon

There is such a thing —

Though you may call it
By another name —
Dharma, integrity
Soul —
Some inner demon
Even love

It says something like:

Whatever the cost

And something like:

This — and nothing else

It is like feet
That would not —
Could not —
Leave the ground
They stand on

Even when the ground
Scorches
Tears

Even when your own hands
And head
Try to lift them off —
Just to sit back
Stretch
Lie down

It’s not something
You can do
Or not do

It’s something
You watch
Happen

Atmosphere
wondering
Crux
dispossession
Words
90
Domain
daimon
Ground
phenomenological
Related poems
  • Dis-identification
  • I Am-ing
